rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation annexes for bindings.
Ensure assumptions and guarantees refer to visible ports and features; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in type scopes.
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
Validate AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) and align assumed types with actual expression types.
Write guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs; place input assumptions and output guarantees in annex agree only with concrete bounds or named constants.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE logical operators include and, or, not(...), and =>; use proper scoping for variables and ports.
Constants and equations should use valid AADL scalar types and avoid opaque Boolean comparisons unless port type is explicitly bool.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs.
Avoid generating clauses for Boolean data ports unless the AADL type and requirement support numeric scalar interpretation.
